_comment: PLAN-0007 Phase 1 + PLAN-0008 Phase 2 (Wave 1 + Wave-2-partial Stop hook) — harness autonomy layer. Tracked (shareable convention, no secrets). Token material lives in env vars + .claude/state/ (gitignored). Hook scripts are stdlib-Python for cross-platform robustness (Cray runs Claude Code on Windows; project lives in WSL Ubuntu 24.04 at \\wsl.localhost\ubuntu-24.04\home\crayj\work\vero-lite). Wave 1 (Step 3 PR) wired Step 2 (pretooluse_loop_detect) + Step 3 (posttooluse_progress_observer). Wave-2-partial (Step 4 PR, expanded scope) wires Step 4 (stop_continuation) early to close the L1 reset gap surfaced in the L1/L4 asymmetry ELI-CTO; classifier inside stop_continuation is stubbed until Step 5 PR lands the real Sonnet helper. Wave 2 completion (Step 6 PR) will wire registry row flips + remove the classifier stub.
